description: Starter Saudi Knowledge Pack v1 — seven priority government and business domains for future RAG use. Seed documents are manually authored; no automated scraping.

sources.title: Qiwa Platform — Saudi Labor Market Services
sources.organization: Ministry of Human Resources and Social Development (HRSD)
sources.allowed_use: registry_only — pending legal review before collection or RAG indexing
sources.notes: Official labor-market platform for work permits, contracts, and related employer services. Seed document is manually written summary only; no site content scraped.

sources.title: Nitaqat (Saudization) Program
sources.organization: Ministry of Human Resources and Social Development (HRSD)
sources.allowed_use: registry_only — pending legal review before collection or RAG indexing
sources.notes: Nitaqat classification system linked to Qiwa. Seed content covers program purpose and color bands at a high level only.

sources.title: Monsha'at — SME Authority
sources.organization: General Authority for Small and Medium Enterprises (Monsha'at)
sources.allowed_use: registry_only — pending legal review before collection or RAG indexing
sources.notes: SME support programs, entrepreneurship enablement, and business development services. Manual seed summary only.

sources.title: ZATCA — Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority
sources.allowed_use: registry_only — pending legal review before collection or RAG indexing
sources.notes: Covers high-level tax, zakat, customs, and e-invoicing concepts. No official publications collected yet.

sources.title: Ministry of Investment (MISA)
sources.allowed_use: registry_only — pending legal review before collection or RAG indexing
sources.notes: Foreign and domestic investment licensing, investor services, and business environment enablement. Manual seed only.

sources.title: Etimad — Government Procurement Platform
sources.organization: National Center for Government Resources Systems (NCGR)
sources.allowed_use: registry_only — pending legal review before collection or RAG indexing
sources.notes: Government tenders, competitions, and procurement workflows. Seed summary for benchmark/RAG planning only.

sources.title: Saudi Vision 2030
sources.notes: Strategic national transformation plan. Legal review file exists and status is PENDING REVIEW; no official content collected.
